news.title: Trump Credits Stealth Operations for Holding Oil Prices Down
news.summary: The U.S. military has escorted ships carrying over 100 million barrels of oil through the Strait of Hormuz since last month, President Donald Trump told reporters in the Oval Office on Wednesday.  Trump says the dead-of-night effort has allowed the world to stay supplied with oil even as Iran has attempted to stop traffic through the strait.  Asked for more details on the operation and when it started, the White House pointed to a Truth Social post on Trump’s account that was released after the press conference.

news.title: Traders Are Shorting Oil As If The Hormuz Crisis Is Over

news.title: Oracle Stock Slides on Mixed Earnings. Software Is an Issue.
news.summary: Oracle  shares were sliding in late trading on Wednesday after the company reported mixed earnings results for its fiscal fourth quarter.  Oracle also said that its capital expenditures for the current fiscal year would be around $70 billion, plus another $20 billion to $25 billion paid directly by customers.  In its just ended fiscal 2026 year, Oracle’s capex was $56 billion, up from $21 billion in fiscal 2025.

news.title: The Model 3 Era at Rivian Begins. Its Lower-Price EV Is Here.
news.summary: Rivian Automotive  has started its Model 3 era.  Rivian said in a social media post Tuesday that its next electric-vehicle model, the R2 SUV, “is here.”  The R2 is Rivian’s second-generation, lower-price group of electric vehicles, following the R1S and R1T, which launched in 2021.

news.title: Decoding PLTR Stock's Premium Valuation
news.summary: At $132.07, Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is being priced to deliver 33.9% revenue growth annually for the next 7 years simply to defend today's 138.6x multiple. That sits below the 67.7% the business is currently growing at, which is the unusual part. The multiple has already priced in a slowdown that has not yet appeared.
